hypothesis: Opening-range continuation after a strong prior-day move may surface replayable continuation candidates with useful forward returns and limited same-day A/B overlap.
single_causal_variable: opening range continuation shadow entry definition

acceptance_rule: observed_only shadow mode; must report candidate count, same-day A/B overlap, 5d/10d/20d forward returns, and scarce-slot proxy before any production promotion
